version_on_server: Edited 8h ago (per Pages dropdown timestamp at capture time)
scrape_method: Buffering window.fetch override installed on a fresh page load, then in-app file-switch (slice-03 then back to slice-02 via the Pages dropdown) to fire an uncached GetFile the hook captured. HTML extracted from the GetFile envelope by slicing <!DOCTYPE html> ... </html>, then blob+anchor download to ~/Downloads and cp into the slice folder.
